username.edge_separators: Username cannot start or end with . or _

onboarding.title: Finish setup
onboarding.description: Tell us a bit about your situation so we can personalize your experience in two quick steps.

step2.question: What is your current balance excluding this month's income, in UZS?
step2.description: Please do not include any income you already received or expect to receive this month.

onboarding.retryHint: We could not load your account profile. Please retry.

initialBalance.invalid: Balance must be a whole number.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your financial overview for this month.
dashboard.totalBalanceHint: Your current net liquidity across all income and expenses.
dashboard.incomeHint: Total revenue received this calendar month.
dashboard.spentHint: Total expenses recorded this calendar month.
dashboard.remainingHint: Your net monthly saving or deficit (Income - Spent).
dashboard.zeroIncomeHint: Your monthly income is set to 0 UZS, so remaining balance is based on that value.
dashboard.dailyTrendThisMonth: Daily trend from the 1st of this month to today
dashboard.upcomingRecurringSubtitle: Predicted charges scheduled for the coming weeks

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile and preferences.
settings.profileDesc: Account profile editing is not wired on backend yet.

settings.preferencesDesc: Language preference is saved in this browser.
settings.signOutConfirmDesc: You will be signed out and redirected to the sign-in page.

settings.signOutFailed: Failed to sign out. Please try again.
settings.premiumDesc: Upgrade to Premium and unlock extra features.

premium.earlyBetaDesc: Help us improve the app and lock in a discounted price forever.
premium.title: Premium
premium.subtitle: Choose a plan and activate manually via Telegram.
premium.foundersDesc: Unlock Recurring Expenses, Savings Goals, and support the developer by grabbing an early-access deal.
premium.sendReceiptHint: Send the receipt screenshot to our Telegram bot to be activated.
premium.invoiceCreateFailed: Failed to create invoice. Please try again.

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.subtitle: Track, filter, and update your spending.
expenses.has_refund_lock: This expense is locked because a refund has been issued. Delete the refund first.
expenses.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive whole number.
expenses.splitAmountRequired: Valid amount is required for splits.
expenses.splitExceedsTotal: Total split amount must not exceed the expense amount.
expenses.dateFuture: Date cannot be in the future.
expenses.startFuture: Start date cannot be in the future.
expenses.endFuture: End date cannot be in the future.
expenses.startAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.
expenses.forbidden: You do not have permission to modify this expense.
expenses.budget_required: Please create a budget for this category and month first.
expenses.has_refund_lock_notice: Locked: Refund Issued. Delete the refund first to modify this expense.
expenses.already_refunded: A refund has already been issued for this expense.
expenses.wallet_locked_notice: Locked: Wallet is archived or locked.
expenses.refundDialogDesc: This will reverse the transaction and return the amount to your wallet. The original transaction will be locked for editing.
expenses.refundDialogDesc_v2: This will reverse "{{title}}" and return the amount to your chosen wallet.
expenses.tooManyWait: Too many requests. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
expenses.tooManySoon: Too many requests. Try again soon.
expenses.future_lock_notice: Time Lock: This expense is from your future. You can edit it once you reach this date locally.
expenses.monthLimitReached: You can only add up to 1000 expenses in the current month.
expenses.budgetRequired: You cannot add an expense for {{category}}. Please create a budget first.
expenses.budgetRequiredForMonth: You cannot add an expense for {{category}} in {{month}}. Please create a budget for that month first.

title.length: Title must be between 3 and 32 characters.

recurring.cardDesc: Manage expenses that automatically repeat. (Max limit is 50)
recurring.confirmEachHelp: We will wait for your confirmation before changing wallets or budgets.
recurring.autoRecordHelp: The expected amount will be recorded automatically from the selected wallet.
recurring.addDialogDesc: Create a template that will automatically generate expenses on a schedule.
recurring.editDialogDesc: Update the details of this recurring template.
recurring.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this template? Future expenses will no longer be created automatically.
recurring.maxLimitReached: You can only have up to 50 active recurring expenses.
recurring.tooManySoon: Too many requests. Try again soon.
recurring.startDateBeforeCurrentMonth: Start date cannot be before the current month.
recurring.premiumTitle: Recurring Expenses are part of Premium
recurring.premiumDesc: Unlock Recurring Expenses and automate your tracking on a schedule with an active Premium subscription.
recurring.titleMinLength: Title must be at least 3 characters.
recurring.amountPositive: Amount must be a positive number.
recurring.budgetRequiredForStartMonth: Cannot create this recurring template for {{category}} because no budget exists for {{month}}. Create that budget first.

errors.recurring_expenses.premium_required: This feature requires a Premium subscription.
errors.recurring_expenses.not_owner: You do not have permission to modify this template.

historyDescription.failed: Payment failed. Check your wallet balance.
historyDescription.resumed: Template was resumed and is now active.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Set your monthly spending limits for this month.
budgets.limitInvalid: Monthly limit must be a positive whole number.
budgets.deleteBlockedLinkedExpenses: This budget cannot be deleted because expenses already exist for this category and month. Remove or move those expenses first.
budgets.tooManyWait: Too many budget requests. Try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
budgets.tooManySoon: Too many budget requests. Try again soon.
budgets.freeMoneyNowHint: Owned wallet money minus protected goal money.
budgets.expectedIncomeHint: Earned income expected later this month.
budgets.expectedIncomeDialogDesc: Add earned income expected for {{month}}. This supports planning but is not cash today.
budgets.expectedIncomeRule: Only earned income sources count. Loans, refunds, asset sales, and money owed to you should not be added here.
budgets.expectedIncomeInvalid: Choose a source, date, and positive expected amount.
budgets.expectedIncomeMonthMismatch: Expected income date must be inside the selected budget month.
budgets.expectedIncomeNotFound: Expected income item was not found.
budgets.noIncomeSourcesForExpected: Create an active income source on Money In first.
budgets.planExceedsBacking: Cannot set this budget. Requested monthly budgets exceed valid backing by {{shortfall}}.
budgets.planExceedsBackingGeneric: Requested budgets exceed valid backing. Add expected income or lower the limit.
budgets.waitingOnIncomeDesc: This plan is short on cash by {{cashGap}}, but expected income covers it.
budgets.planNeedsRepairDesc: This active plan exceeds valid backing by {{shortfall}}. Reduce limits or add expected earned income before increasing budgets.
budgets.monthlyBudgetTotalHint: Total monthly spending permission for this month.
budgets.budgetRoomAfterPlanHint: Free money now after all monthly limits.
budgets.borrowingPressureHint: Some budgeted spending used borrowed capacity.

planStatus.coveredWithCushionHint: Your monthly limits fit free money now and leave room.
planStatus.coveredNoCushionHint: Your monthly limits fit free money now, but leave no room.
planStatus.waitingOnIncomeHint: Current cash is short, but expected earned income covers this plan.
planStatus.overPlannedHint: Monthly limits exceed valid backing. Reduce limits or add expected earned income.
planStatus.unknownHint: This budget plan status is not recognized yet.

budgets.emptyCurrentDesc: Create a budget for the current month or show history.
budgets.filtersDesc: Refine which budgets are visible and how they are ordered.
budgets.emptyFilteredDesc: Try changing filters or resetting them.
budgets.addDialogDesc: Select a category and set a monthly limit.

limit.invalid: Monthly limit must be a positive whole number.

month.invalid: Please select a valid budget month.
month.tooEarly: Budget month cannot be earlier than January 2020.
month.tooFar: Budget month is too far in the future.

target.required: Please select a valid budget first.

income.title: Income Ledger
income.subtitle: Track your income entries and sources in one place.
income.filtersDesc: Filter income entries by source and date range.
income.filtersBothDates: Please select both start and end date.
income.filtersStartAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.
income.thisMonthTotalDesc: Sum of income entries in the current month.
income.sourcesDesc: Reusable source labels for your entries.
income.addSourceDesc: Create a source name to classify income entries.
income.deleteEntryDesc: This income entry will be removed.
income.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive whole number.
income.dateCurrentMonthOnly: Date must be within the current month.
income.dateFuture: Date cannot be in the future.
income.sourceLimitReached: You can only have up to 20 income sources.
income.sourcesTooManySoon: Too many income source requests. Try again soon.
income.entryMonthLimitReached: You can only add up to 300 income entries in the current month.
income.entriesTooManySoon: Too many income entry requests. Try again soon.
income.dateRangeBothRequired: Please provide both start and end date.
income.startAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.
income.entryActionsDesc: Choose what you want to do with this income entry.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Understand your spending trends.
analytics.filtersDesc: Choose either a quick preset or a custom date range.
analytics.quickPresetsDesc: Presets always use the last N days up to today.
analytics.customRangeDesc: Provide both dates, from 2020-01-01 to today, with a maximum of 366 days (inclusive).
analytics.hintPickBoth: Pick both start and end date.
analytics.hintProvideBoth: Provide both start and end date.
analytics.hintTooEarly: Dates earlier than 2020-01-01 are not allowed.
analytics.hintEndFuture: End date cannot be in the future.
analytics.hintStartAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.

savings.title: Savings & Goals
savings.subtitle: Move money into savings, then lock it into goals.
savings.premiumTitle: Savings & Goals are part of Premium
savings.premiumDesc: Move money from your spendable balance into savings, reserve it for goals, and manage it from one focused workspace.

cards.totalBalanceHint: Your full wealth across spendable cash, savings, and future goals.
cards.spendableHint: Money still available for normal app spending.
cards.freeSavingsHint: Reserved cash not yet locked into a goal.
cards.lockedGoalsHint: Savings already allocated to future goals.

savings.transferDesc: Shift money between spendable balance and savings from one place.
savings.negativeSpendableHint: Spendable balance is below zero, so deposits are temporarily unavailable.
savings.depositHint: This amount will move out of spendable balance and into savings.
savings.withdrawHint: This amount will return from savings back into spendable balance.
savings.depositCaption: Deposit is an internal transfer. It does not count as an expense.
savings.withdrawCaption: Withdraw brings reserved savings back into your spendable balance.
savings.insufficientSpendable: You do not have enough spendable balance for this transfer.
savings.insufficientFree: You do not have enough free savings to withdraw this amount.
savings.tooManySoon: Too many savings actions. Please try again soon.

goals.createDesc: Start a new savings target, set the amount and deadline, and keep it ready for contributions.
goals.createHint: Keep goals short and clear. You can start contributing from free savings right after creation.
goals.listDesc: Track each goal by progress, deadline, and locked savings in one place.
goals.emptyDesc: Pick a template above and turn your next savings target into a live card.
goals.archiveDesc: Archived goals can be restored later. Any money locked in this goal will be returned to free savings automatically.
goals.deletePermanentDesc: This permanently removes the archived goal.
goals.contributeDesc: Move money from free savings into this goal.
goals.returnDesc: Release money from this goal back into free savings.
goals.contributeHint: Goal contributions lock money. It stays yours, but it is no longer free savings.
goals.returnHint: Returning money makes it freely movable inside savings again.
goals.projectLinkedHint: Releases from this goal now fund the linked project.
goals.initialReleaseHint: Optional. Leave blank to create the project first and release money later.
goals.tooManySoon: Too many goal actions. Please try again soon.
goals.insufficientFreeSavings: You do not have enough free savings for this contribution.
goals.insufficientGoalBalance: You cannot return more than is currently locked in this goal.
goals.insufficientUnreleasedBalance: You cannot move back more than the unreleased amount in this goal.
goals.projectAlreadyExists: This goal already has a linked project.
goals.releaseExceedsUnreleased: You cannot release more than the unreleased amount.
goals.projectReleaseExceedsTotalLimit: This release would exceed the linked project total limit.
goals.projectNotActive: The linked project must be active before it can receive released funding.
goals.releaseBeforeProjectStart: Release date cannot be before the project start date.
goals.releaseAfterProjectCompletion: Release date cannot be after project completion.
goals.targetBelowFunded: Target amount cannot be lower than the money already locked in this goal.
goals.archiveRequiresZeroFunded: Return all locked money before archiving this goal.
goals.activeLimitReached: You can keep up to 20 active goals at a time.
goals.archivedLimitReached: You can keep up to 100 archived goals at a time.
goals.deleteRequiresArchived: Only archived goals can be permanently deleted.
goals.deleteRequiresZeroFunded: Archived goals with locked money cannot be permanently deleted.
goals.restoreRequiresArchived: Only archived goals can be restored.
goals.archivedReadOnly: Archived goals are read-only. Restore the goal first to change its money.

amount.invalid: Amount must be a positive whole number.

export.title: Export
export.subtitle: Download your expenses as CSV.
export.cardDesc: Filters are optional. Export will include matching expenses only.
export.startTooEarly: Start date cannot be earlier than 2020-01-01.
export.endTooEarly: End date cannot be earlier than 2020-01-01.
export.startAfterEnd: Start date cannot be after end date.
export.tooManyWait: Too many export requests. Please try again in {{seconds}} seconds.
export.tooManySoon: Too many export requests. Please try again soon.
export.too_many_requests: Too many export requests. Please try again later.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you requested does not exist or the URL is incorrect.

categories_desc.Groceries: Only raw materials and unprepared food (not ready-to-eat)
categories_desc.Dining Out: Restaurants, cafes, food delivery, and ready-to-eat meals
categories_desc.Electronics: Phones, gadgets, accessories, repairs, and device purchases
categories_desc.Housing: Rent, mortgage, property taxes, and home maintenance
categories_desc.Utilities: Electricity, water, gas, internet, and phone bills
categories_desc.Subscriptions: Streaming services, gym, and recurring software fees
categories_desc.Transport: Fuel, public transit, taxi, parking, and car maintenance
categories_desc.Health: Doctor visits, pharmacy, insurance, and fitness related costs
categories_desc.Personal care: Skincare, toiletries, cosmetics, haircuts, and self-care essentials
categories_desc.Education: Tuition fees, courses, books, and development materials
categories_desc.Family & Events: Gifts, ceremonies, charity, and supporting relatives
categories_desc.Entertainment: Cinema, hobbies, travel, and leisure activities
categories_desc.Installments & Debt: Loan repayments, installments, and credit card debt
categories_desc.Business / Work: Client meetings, office supplies, software tools, and work travel
categories_desc.Debt Charges: Interest, penalties, markup, and other extra debt costs

messages.budget_exceeded_detail: You've exceeded your {{category}} budget by {{over}} UZS
messages.goal_milestone_50_detail: You're halfway to your {{goal}} goal! Keep going!

goal.failedToGraduate: Failed to create project from goal

debts.title: Debts & Payment Plans
debts.description: Manage debts and scheduled payment plans
debts.toggleReceived: Did you receive this money? If yes, it will be added to your wallet.
debts.toggleGiven: Did you already give this money? If yes, it will be deducted from your wallet.
debts.walletImpactIncrease: * We will automatically increase this wallet's balance by the debt amount.
debts.walletImpactDecrease: * We will automatically decrease this wallet's balance by the debt amount.
debts.activeSubtitle: Review and manage your pending balances.

empty.title: No debts yet
empty.description: Track money you owe or are owed by adding your first debt.

create.title: Add Debt
create.description: Add and track a new debt

debts.freeLimitTooltip: Upgrade to Premium to delete debts

delete.title: Delete Debt
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{title}}"? This action cannot be undone.

reversal.reverseWarning: This will restore app wallet money only when the real payment failed, was cancelled, refunded, or was recorded by mistake. Use forgiveness, settlement, charge, correction, or refund paths for other real-world changes.
reversal.undoPaymentWarning: This will undo the latest payment-plan payment and restore app wallet money. Use it only when the real payment failed, was cancelled, refunded, or was recorded by mistake.
reversal.olderPaymentBlocked: Undo newer payment-plan payments before undoing older payments.

wallets.cardDesc: Manage your physical and digital wallets.
wallets.formHint: Customize your wallet look and feel.
wallets.deleteWarning: Are you sure you want to archive '{{name}}'? This will hide the wallet from your dashboard but preserve all past transaction history.
wallets.archiveWarning: Are you sure you want to archive '{{name}}'? It will be moved to the archived wallets section.
wallets.archive_not_empty: Please move the remaining balance out of this wallet before archiving.
wallets.type_savings_desc: Real savings account or reserve wallet
wallets.overdraft_tip: Tip: Enable overdraft in the next step to allow negative balances.
wallets.reconcile_description: Sync your wallet balance with the real-world balance.
wallets.reconcile_limit_warning: Warning: new balance exceeds the allowed limit.
wallets.reconcile_owed_credit_help: Enter your total debt amount as a positive number.
wallets.reconcile_owed_overdraft_help: Enter the total amount of the overdraft balance.
wallets.reconcile_owned_help: Enter the total amount you currently have available.
wallets.overdraft_hint: Allow balance to go below zero (bank credit)
wallets.overlimit_hint: Can you spend past your credit limit?
wallets.reconcile_note_placeholder: e.g. End of month manual sync
wallets.limit_reached: You can have up to 200 wallets max
wallets.transfer_to_same: Cannot transfer to the same wallet

validation.limitInvalid: Limit must be a positive number
validation.limitRequired: Limit must be greater than zero
validation.balanceExceedsLimit: Balance magnitude cannot exceed the defined limit

wallets.budget_autocreated: A budget of 50,000 UZS was automatically created for 'Bank Fees & Interest' this month. Please adjust it later if needed.
wallets.action_not_supported_for_cash: This action is not supported for Cash wallets.
